cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]písmeno E[/hlp]. Svislý tah má [hlp]80 bodů[/hlp], horní a dolní vodorovné tahy mají [hlp]60 bodů[/hlp], střední tah má [hlp]40 bodů[/hlp]. Nezapomeňte zvednout pero před každým přesunem.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b4"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b5"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b6"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b7"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b8"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b9"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b10"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b11"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b12"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b13"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b14"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b15"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b16"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b17"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
